所有程序包|所有类和接口

R

R - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
 
R() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.R
 
remove(String) - 类中的静态方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.ImageCacheManager
Removes a bitmap from the cache.
removeBase64(String) - 类中的静态方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.ImageCacheManager
Removes a Base64 string from the cache.
removeComment(String) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.CommentAdapter
Removes a comment from the list by its ID and animates the removal.
removeInvitedUserFromEvent(String, String, EventLotteryRepository.SimpleCallback) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.EventLotteryRepository
Removes an invited user from the event document after they decline.
reportComment(String, String, CommentRepository.RepositoryCallback) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.CommentRepository
Reports a comment, incrementing its report count and adding the reporting user.
runLottery(String, String, int, EventLotteryRepository.LotteryActionCallback) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.EventLotteryRepository
Runs the lottery for an event by sampling a specified number of entrants from the wait list.
